findings.description: Ensure table headers have discernible text
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers [<th></th>]

findings.description: Cover page logo appears slightly different in size/rendering but is present and correctly placed
findings.evidence: PDF shows NC Coastal Recreational Fishing License logo centered on cover page; HTML shows same logo in similar position

findings.description: Marine Resources Fund Balance table in PDF has clear row separations, while HTML version splits some monetary values across two lines within cells (e.g., '$15,080,055' shown as '$ 15,080,055' on two lines), but data is preserved
findings.evidence: PDF shows compact single-line dollar amounts in table cells; HTML shows some dollar signs separated from amounts on different lines within the same cell

findings.description: Marine Resources Endowment Fund Balance table has similar two-line splitting of dollar values in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows values like '$1,135,370' on one line; HTML shows '$ 1,135,370' split across lines within cells

findings.description: The PDF page 3 contains both the Marine Resources Fund Balance table and Marine Resources Endowment Fund Balance table plus Projects Approved and Summary sections all on one page, while HTML splits these across multiple page-equivalent sections
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 is a dense single page with multiple tables; HTML spreads this across pages 3-6 equivalent sections

findings.description: In the county sales tables, Avery county 2014 Rank is blank in both PDF and HTML (0 sold), which is correctly preserved
findings.evidence: Both PDF and HTML show Avery with 0 sold and no rank in 2014

findings.description: For Hire Blanket license table for 2014 in HTML does not show the 'More than 6 passengers' row that appears in the PDF
findings.evidence: PDF 2014 For Hire table shows two rows (6 or fewer passengers and More than 6 passengers) with totals; HTML only shows 6 or fewer passengers row and total row
